title: BSP EMCE encryption hook audit
observations: The BSP host struct has a sunxi_mmc_on_off_emce hook and request-path call sites guarded by crypt flags.
The audited BSP slice has no assignment to sunxi_mmc_on_off_emce.
Without an assigned hook, the EMCE path is inactive for ordinary SDMMC0 reads.
The crypt flag is encoded in scatterlist offset metadata and is not part of the normal failing CMD18 proof.
reason: EMCE is inactive scaffolding in this BSP slice and does not name a concrete A733 SDMMC0 descriptor-fetch access/security bit.
next: Do not retest EMCE unless another source provides an assigned A733 register hook used by SDMMC0 normal IDMAC.
